recommendations.title: Die Alone

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: The One I Love
recommendations.overview: Ethan and Sophie are a married couple on the brink of separation when, at the urging of their therapist, they decide to salvage their relationship by escaping to a beautiful vacation house for the weekend.

recommendations.title: About Adam
recommendations.overview: A waitress falls for a handsome customer who seduces her, her two sisters, her brother, and her brother's girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: The Dirties
recommendations.overview: The line between reality and fiction starts to blur when two best friends start making a movie about getting revenge on bullies.

recommendations.title: All I Want For Christmas
recommendations.overview: Siblings Ethan and Hallie O'Fallon plot to get their divorced parents back together in time for Christmas.

recommendations.title: Guzaarish
recommendations.overview: Ethan, a magician rendered paralyzed in an accident, sets off a furor when he makes a petition to the court to end his own life.
